info.title: Freshsales CRM API
info.description: Freshsales is a CRM by Freshworks. This API provides access to contacts, accounts, deals, tasks, appointments, notes, sales activities, marketing lists, products, documents, and search.

get.summary: List contacts from a filtered view

post.summary: Create or update a contact based on unique identifier

get.summary: List accounts from a filtered view
List deals from a filtered view

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid authorization header
